goal: Persist runtime and DB diagnostics samples during k6 Real Backend runs, not only at completion.
changed: Added 1-second run-scoped diagnostics sampling while k6 is running.
Persisted diagnostics snapshots as metrics through the existing report store.
Added component coverage proving multiple diagnostics samples are retained.
intentionallyNotChanged: No database schema or query-shape changes.
No direct latency optimization in this slice.

validations.summary: Contract 1 skipped, Component 124, Unit 56, Architecture 35, Integration 224

validations.command: curl health checks for nginx and backend

risks: k6 still exposes request counters from the final summary rather than live streaming counters.
The 1-second diagnostics capture is low overhead but should remain scoped to admin-triggered real load tests.
Production capacity assessment still needs cgroup-aware confirmation on the shared 2 CPU / 8 GiB server.
Existing AWSSDK.Core NU1901 warning remains unrelated.
finalRecommendation: Merge this observability slice, rerun a production-like spike, and choose the next structural backend optimization from retained per-second diagnostics.
